caption: A group of men wearing traditional attire, including various styles of caps and robes, are seated in a formal assembly hall with green seating. Some men wear face masks, while one man in a blue outfit and red cap adjusts his mask. In the foreground, a man in a white robe and cap gestures with his hands while speaking to others. On-screen graphics include a news banner stating "JUSUN STRIKE" and "REPS URGE FG TO ENSURE SPEEDY RESOLUTION." Additional text reads "Watch us on DSTV CHANNEL 408" and "Follow us f 𝕏 📷 plustvafrica," accompanied by the "plustv" logo. As the scene progresses, the men remain in their seats, continuing their conversation and gestures. The camera angle remains steady, capturing the ongoing discussion within the assembly setting as the lower graphic overlay changes slightly in the later frames.
